<!-- Theme color (browse= r chrome on mobile) -->

<link href=3D"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=3DCormorant+Garamond= :ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;0,700;1,300;1,400&family=3DMontserrat:wght= @200;300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=3DOswald:wght@200;300;400;500;6= 00;700&display=3Dswap" rel=3D"stylesheet">
<style>
/*
FONT SYSTEM =E2=80=94 MATCHED FROM LOGO:
"Tara" =E2=86= =92 Cormorant Garamond (elegant serif, high contrast thick/thin strokes)
"tech" =E2=86=92 Montserrat (clean geometric sans, = uniform weight)
*/
:root {
= /* Logo-anchored warm tones */
--gold: #C9A84C;
= --gold-light: #E8C76A;
--gold-bright: #F0D060;
-= -red: #C0392B;
--purple: #5B= 189A;
--purple-light: #8B33D4;
/* Electric blue = =E2=80=94 primary UI accent */
--blue: #0EA5E9;
-= -blue-bright: #38BDF8;
= --blue-dim: #0369A1;
--blu= e-glow: #00D4FF;
--dark: #= 000000;
--dark-2: #040C18;
--dark-3: #071120;
--dark-4: #0A1628;
--text: #E2EAF4;
-= -text-dim: #7A90A8;
--font-serif: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgi= a, serif;
--font-sans: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
= --font-condensed: 'Oswald', sans-serif;
}

*, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; = }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

bod= y {
background: var(--dark);
color: var(--text);<= /td>
font-family: var(--font-sans);
font-weight: 300;<= /td>
overflow-x: hidden;
cursor: auto;
}

.cursor {
width: 10px; height: 10px; ba= ckground: var(--blue-bright); border-radius: 50%;
position: fi= xed; top: 0; left: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9999;
tra= nsform: translate(-50%,-50%); transition: width .2s, height .2s;
= }
.cursor-ring {
width: 34px; height: 34px; bord= er: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.5); border-radius: 50%;
positio= n: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 9998;
= transform: translate(-50%,-50%); transition: transform .14s ease-out, wid= th .3s, height .3s;
}

body::before {
content: ''; position: fixed; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-= index: 1; opacity: .35;
background-image: url("data:image/svg= +xml,%3Csvg viewBox=3D'0 0 256 256' xmlns=3D'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E= %3Cfilter id=3D'n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type=3D'fractalNoise' baseFrequency=3D= '0.9' numOctaves=3D'4' stitchTiles=3D'stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width= =3D'100%25' height=3D'100%25' filter=3D'url(%23n)' opacity=3D'0.04'/%3E%3C/= svg%3E");
}

/* NAV */
na= v {
position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;=
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-b= etween;
padding: 1.1rem 3.5rem;
background: lin= ear-gradient(135deg, rgba(4,12,24,.82) 0%, rgba(7,17,32,.78) 100%);
backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(1.4);
-webkit-bac= kdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(1.4);
border-bottom: 1px so= lid rgba(201,168,76,.12);
box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(14,165,233= ,.06), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
}
.nav-logo { he= ight: 52px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(14,165,233,.4)); transition: = filter .3s; }

.nav-links { display: fle= x; gap: .55rem; list-style: none; align-items: center; }

.nav-links li { position: relative; }

.= nav-links a {
letter-spacing: .2em; text-transfor= m: uppercase; color: rgba(226,234,244,.7);
text-decoration: n= one; position: relative;
display: flex; align-items: center; = gap: .45rem;
padding: .52rem 1.25rem;
/* Glass= tile */
background: linear-gradient(135deg,
= rgba(255,255,255,.065) 0%,
rgba(255,255,255,.02) 50%,
rgba(14,165,233,.04) 100%
);
border:= 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);
border-top-color: rgba(255,= 255,255,.18);
border-bottom-color: rgba(0,0,0,.25);
border-right-c= olor: rgba(0,0,0,.15);
border-radius: 6px;
box-= shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.12),
= inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.2),
0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.28),=
0 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,0);
transition: all = .22s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
}

/* Tiny icon dot per tile */
.nav-links a::before {
content: '';
width:= 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 50%;
background: rgba(201,1= 68,76,.5);
flex-shrink: 0;
transition: backgrou= nd .22s, box-shadow .22s;
}

.nav-lin= ks a:hover {
color: #fff;
background: linear-gr= adient(135deg,
rgb= a(14,165,233,.06) 50%,
rgba(201,168,76,.08) 100%
= );
border-color: rgba(14,165,233,.35);
bor= der-top-color: rgba(14,165,233,.55);
box-shadow:
= inset 0 1px 0 rgba(14,165,233,.25),
inset 0 -1px 0 rgba= (0,0,0,.2),
0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.35),
0 0= 20px rgba(14,165,233,.12);
transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.nav-links a:hover::before {
background: var(--blue);
box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(14,16= 5,233,.9);
}

.nav-links a:active {
transform: translateY(0px);
box-shadow:
inset 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.3),
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(= 14,165,233,.15),
0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
}

/* Active/current page tile */
.nav-li= nks a.active {
backgr= ound: linear-gradient(135deg,
rgba(201,168,76,.15) 0%,
rgba(201,168,76,.05) 100%
);
borde= r-color: rgba(201,168,76,.3);
border-top-color: rgba(201,168= ,76,.5);
box-shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(201,1= 68,76,.2),
0 0 14px rgba(201,168,76,.1);
}
.nav-links a.active::before {
background: var(--gold)= ;
box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(201,168,76,.9);
}

.nav-cta {
font-family: var(--font-con= densed); font-size: .68rem; font-weight: 600;
letter-spacing:= .25em; text-transform: uppercase;
padding: .55rem 1.6rem;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201,168,76,.22) 0%, rg= ba(201,168,76,.08) 100%);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.= 45);
border-top-color: rgba(201,168,76,.65);
bo= rder-bottom-color: rgba(0,0,0,.3);
border-radius: 6px;
color: var(--gold-light); cursor: auto;
box-shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14),
inset = 0 -1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.2),
0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3),
0 0 16px rgba(201,168,76,.08);
transition: all .22s = cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
text-decoration: none; display: inli= ne-flex; align-items: center;
backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
}
.nav-cta:hover {
background: linear-g= radient(135deg, rgba(201,168,76,.38) 0%, rgba(201,168,76,.18) 100%);
border-color: rgba(201,168,76,.7);
box-shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.2),
0 4px 20px rg= ba(0,0,0,.4),
= color: #fff; transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.nav-ct= a:active { transform: translateY(0); }


/* Black backing for logo screen-blend to work on any bg */
.logo-wrap {
display: inli= ne-flex;
border-radius: 4px;
}
.logo-= wrap-block {
background: #000;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
border-radius: 8px;
padding: 4px;
}
/* HERO */
= .hero {
min-height: 100vh; = display: flex; flex-direction: column;
align-items: center; j= ustify-content: center;
position: relative; overflow: hidden;= padding: 8rem 2rem 4rem;
}
.hero-bg {
= position: absolute; inset: 0;
background:
r= adial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 50%, rgba(91,24,154,.11) 0%, transpar= ent 65%),
radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 40% at 78% 20%, rgba(= 14,165,233,.06) 0%, transparent 60%),
radial-gradient(ellip= se 50% 50% at 22% 80%, rgba(14,165,233,.04) 0%, transparent 60%),
var(--dark);
}
.hero-grid { position: absolu= te; inset: 0; overflow: hidden; opacity: .06; }
.hero-grid::bef= ore {
content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -50%;
background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(14,165,233,.35) 1px, transpar= ent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(14,165,233,.35) 1px, transparent 1px)= ;
background-size: 60px 60px; animation: gridMove 22s linear = infinite;
transform: rotateX(60deg) translateY(-20%);
}
@keyframes gridMove {
0% { transform: r= otateX(60deg) translateY(-20%); }
100% { transform: rotateX(6= 0deg) translateY(calc(-20% + 60px)); }
}
.particles= { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; }
.parti= cle { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--gold); anim= ation: floatUp linear infinite; opacity: 0; }
@keyframes floatU= p {
0% { transform: translateY(100vh) scale(0); opacity: 0;= }
10% { opacity: .8; }
90% { opacity: .4; }<= /td>
100% { transform: translateY(-10vh) scale(1); opacity: 0; }
}

.hero-content { position: relative;= z-index: 2; text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; ali= gn-items: center; }

.hero-logo {
w= idth: min(400px, 78vw); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(201,168,76,.4)) d= rop-shadow(0 0 80px rgba(14,165,233,.22));
animation: logoRev= eal 1.2s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) forwards, logoPulse 4.5s ease-in-out 1.2s= infinite;
}
@keyframes logoReveal {
= from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(.75) translateY(28px); }
= to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes logoPulse {
0%,100% { filter: drop-shadow(= 0 0 40px rgba(201,168,76,.4)) drop-shadow(0 0 80px rgba(14,165,233,.22)); }=
50% { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 65px rgba(240,208,96,.6)) = drop-shadow(0 0 110px rgba(14,165,233,.4)); }
}

<= /td>
/* Oswald =E2=80=94 matches logo subtitle style */
= .hero-tagline {
font-weight: 300; letter-spaci= ng: .45em; color: var(--blue-bright);
text-transform: upperca= se; margin-top: .6rem;
opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp .8s ease= .9s forwards;

/* Cormorant Gara= mond =E2=80=94 matches "Tara" serif in logo */
.hero-headline {=
font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: clamp(3rem,7vw,6.= 5rem);
font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: = -.01em; margin-top: 1.8rem;
background: linear-gradient(135de= g, var(--gold-light) 0%, #fff 45%, var(--blue-bright) 70%, #fff 100%);
-webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transpare= nt; background-clip: text;
opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp .8s = ease 1.05s forwards;
<= /td> }

/* Montserrat= =E2=80=94 matches "tech" sans in logo */
.hero-sub {
font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: clamp(.85rem,1.6vw,1.05rem);=
font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: .12em; color: var(--text-d= im); margin-top: 1.1rem;
opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp .8s ea= se 1.2s forwards;
}
.hero-sub span { color: var(--p= urple-light); font-weight: 500; }

.hero-actions = { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 3rem; opacity: 0; animation: fade= Up .8s ease 1.4s forwards; }

/* Oswald for all= buttons */
/* =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 ULTRA-PREMIUM BUTTONS =E2=94= =80=E2=94=80 */
position: relative= ; overflow: hidden;
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-= size: .8rem; font-weight: 600;
letter-spacing: .35em; text-tr= ansform: uppercase;
padding: 1.05rem 3rem;
colo= r: #fff; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; = gap: .6rem;
cursor: pointer; border: none;
back= ground: linear-gradient(135deg,
#1ac8ff 0%, #0EA5E9 35%, #0= 369A1 70%, #0EA5E9 100%);
background-size: 200% 200%;
border-radius: 4px;
box-shadow:
0 0 0 = 1px rgba(14,165,233,.5),
0 0 20px rgba(14,165,233,.25),
0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.5),
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(= 255,255,255,.2);
transition: background-position .5s ease, tr= ansform .25s ease,
box-shadow .25s ease, filter .= 25s;
animation: btn-gradient-shift 4s ease infinite;
}
@keyframes btn-gradient-shift {
0%,100% = { background-position: 0% 50%; }
50% { background-positi= on: 100% 50%; }
.btn-primary::before {
content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
background: l= inear-gradient(105deg,
transparent 30%, rgba(255,255,255,.1= 8) 50%, transparent 70%);
transform: translateX(-100%);
transition: transform .55s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}<= /td>
.btn-primary:hover::before { transform: translateX(100%); }
.btn-primary:hover {
transform: translateY(-3px);
box-shadow:
0 0 0 1px rgba(14,165,233,.8),
0 0 35px rgba(14,165,233,.45),
0 12px 40px rgb= a(0,0,0,.55),
filter: brightness(1.1);
}
.btn-primary:activ= e { transform: translateY(-1px); }
.btn-primary::after {
content: '\2192'; font-size: .85rem; opacity: 0;
tran= sform: translateX(-6px);
transition: opacity .25s, transform = .25s;
}
= .btn-primary:hover::after { opacity: 1; t= ransform: translateX(0); }

.btn-secondary {
position: relative; overflow: hidden;
font-family: = var(--font-condensed); font-size: .8rem; font-weight: 500;
le= tter-spacing: .35em; text-transform: uppercase;
padding: 1.05= rem 3rem;
color: var(--blue-bright); text-decoration: none;
display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .6rem;
cursor: pointer;
background: rgba(14,165,233,.04);
border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.4);
border-top-= color: rgba(14,165,233,.7);
border-radius: 4px;
= box-shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(14,165,233,.12),
= 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
transition: all .28s ease;
}
.btn-secondary::before {
content: ''= ; position: absolute; inset: 0;
background: linear-gradient(1= 05deg,
transparent 30%, rgba(14,165,233,.1) 50%, transpare= nt 70%);
transform: translateX(-100%);
transiti= on: transform .55s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}
.btn-= secondary:hover::before { transform: translateX(100%); }
.btn-s= econdary:hover {
transform: translateY(-3px);
c= olor: #fff;
background: rgba(14,165,233,.1);
bo= rder-color: rgba(14,165,233,.8);
border-top-color: #fff;
box-shadow:
= inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.15),<= /td>
0 0 28px rgba(14,165,233,.3),
0 12px 35px r= gba(0,0,0,.45);
.btn-secondary:active { transfor= m: translateY(-1px); }
.btn-secondary::after {
co= ntent: '\2192'; font-size: .85rem; opacity: 0;
transform: tra= nslateX(-6px);
}
.btn-secondary:hover::after { opacity: 1; transform: = translateX(0); }

.hero-scroll {
po= sition: absolute; bottom: 2.5rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; ga= p: .6rem;
opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 1s ease 2s forwards;<= /td>
}
.scroll-line { width: 1px; height: 48= px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--blue), transparent); anima= tion: scrollPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
@keyframes scrollP= ulse { 0%,100% { opacity: .3; transform: scaleY(1); } 50% { opacity: 1; tra= nsform: scaleY(.65); } }

@keyframes fadeUp { fro= m { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(18px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: = translateY(0); } }
@keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to= { opacity: 1; } }

.divider { height: 1px; backg= round: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--blue-dim), var(--blue),= var(--gold), transparent); opacity: .35; }

/* S= ECTION BASE */

/* Oswald for all section labels */
.section-label {
<= /td> font-family: var(--font-condensed); font= -size: .68rem; font-weight: 400;
letter-spacing: .55em; color= : var(--blue); text-transform: uppercase;
display: flex; alig= n-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
}
.section-label::before { content: ''; flex: none; width: 28px; height: = 1px; background: var(--blue); }

/* Cormorant for= all section titles */
.section-title {
font-fam= ily: var(--font-serif); font-size: clamp(2.2rem,4.5vw,4rem);
= font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -.01em;
= background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff, var(--gold-light));
= -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; backg= round-clip: text;
max-width: 720px;
}
<= br>
/* ABOUT */
.about { background: var(--dark-2);= display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 6rem; align-items: cen= ter; }

/* Montserrat for body copy */
.about-text p {
font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: = 1rem; font-weight: 300;
line-height: 1.95; color: var(--text-= dim); margin-top: 2rem;
}
.about-text p strong { fo= nt-weight: 600; color: var(--blue-bright); }

.ab= out-visual { position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; al= ign-items: center; }
<= /td> .about-logo { width: 88%; filter: drop-sha= dow(0 0 55px rgba(14,165,233,.3)); animation: logoFloat 6s ease-in-out infi= nite; }
@keyframes logoFloat { 0%,100% { transform: translateY(= 0) rotate(-1deg); } 50% { transform: translateY(-14px) rotate(1deg); } }
.about-ring { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px= solid; animation: ringRotate linear infinite; }
.ring-1 { widt= h: 110%; height: 110%; border-color: rgba(14,165,233,.18); animation-durati= on: 22s; }
.ring-2 { width: 132%; height: 132%; border-color: r= gba(91,24,154,.12); animation-duration: 32s; animation-direction: reverse; = }
@keyframes ringRotate { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to = { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

/* SERVICES */<= /td>
.services { background: var(--dark); }
.services-= header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 5rem; }
.services-= header .section-label { justify-content: center; }
.services-= header .section-label::before { display: none; }

= .services-grid {
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repea= t(3,1fr); gap: 1.5px;
= background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb= a(14,165,233,.12), rgba(91,24,154,.06));
border: 1px solid rg= ba(14,165,233,.12);
}
.service-card { background: v= ar(--dark-3); padding: 3rem 2.5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; t= ransition: background .4s; }
.service-card::before {
content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2= px;
background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--= blue), transparent);
<= /td> transform: scaleX(0); transition: transf= orm .4s;
}
.service-card:hover { background: rgba(1= 4,165,233,.04); }
.service-card:hover::before { transform: scal= eX(1); }

/* Cormorant for decorative service num= bers */
.service-num {
font-family: var(--font-se= rif); font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 300;
color: rgba(14,165= ,233,.07); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
transition:= color .4s; letter-spacing: -.02em;
}
.service-card= :hover .service-num { color: rgba(14,165,233,.18); }

.service-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: .8rem; display: bloc= k; }

/* Oswald for service titles */
= .service-title {
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-si= ze: 1.05rem; font-weight: 500;
letter-spacing: .12em; text-tr= ansform: uppercase; color: var(--blue-bright); margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

/* Montserrat for service body */
.service-desc { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .88rem; fon= t-weight: 300; line-height: 1.82; color: var(--text-dim); }

<= /td>
/* ECOSYSTEM */
.ecosystem { background: var(--dark= -2); text-align: center; }
.ecosystem .section-label { justify-= content: center; }
.ecosystem .section-label::before { display:= none; }
.ecosystem .section-title { margin: 0 auto 1.4rem; tex= t-align: center; }

/* Cormorant italic for pull-= quote */
.ecosystem-sub {
font-family: var(--font= -serif); font-style: italic; font-size: 1.3rem;
font-weight: = 300; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 5rem; letter-spacing: .03em;
}

/* ECOSYSTEM PILLARS =E2=80=94 premi= um tiles */
.ecosystem-pillars {
display: grid; g= rid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr);
gap: 2rem; max-width: 11= 00px; margin: 0 auto;
= }

.pillar {<= /td>
position: relative; overflow: hidden;
padding:= 3rem 2.5rem 2.5rem;
<= /td> display: flex; flex-direction: column; g= ap: .7rem;
background: linear-gradient(145deg,
= rgba(255,255,255,.06) 0%,
rgba(14,165,233,.04) 50%,
rgba(201,168,76,.03) 100%
);
border:= 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
border-top-color: rgba(255,2= 55,255,.2);
border-left-color: rgba(255,255,255,.14);
border-bottom-color: rgba(0,0,0,.3);
border-right-colo= r: rgba(0,0,0,.2);
border-radius: 16px;
backdro= p-filter: blur(12px);
= box-shadow:
inset 0 1px= 0 rgba(255,255,255,.12),
inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.2),
0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
cursor: default;
transition: transform .35s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),
= box-shadow .35s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),
= border-color .35s;
}

/* Shimme= r line at top on hover */
.pillar::before {
conte= nt: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--blue), var(--g= old), transparent);
opacity: 0; transition: opacity .35s;
}

/* Ambient glow orb in corner */
.pillar::after {
content: ''; position: absolute; top= : -60px; right: -60px;
width: 160px; height: 160px; border-ra= dius: 50%;
background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(14,165,2= 33,.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
transition: opacity .35s; opac= ity: 0;
}
=
.pillar:hover {
= transform: translateY(-10px);
border-color: rgba(14,165,2= 33,.45);
border-top-color: rgba(14,165,233,.65);
= box-shadow:
0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.55),
0 0 40px rgba(14,165,23= 3,.12);
}
= .pillar:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
.pillar:hover::after { opacity: 1; }

/= * Active (TaraTech) tile =E2=80=94 gold accent */
.pillar.activ= e {
border-color: rgba(201,168,76,.45);
border-= top-color: rgba(201,168,76,.7);
background: linear-gradient(1= 45deg,
rgba(201,168,76,.1) 0%,
rgba(14,165= ,233,.05) 50%,
);
box-shadow:
<= /td> inset 0 1px 0 rgba(201,168,76,.2),
0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5),
0 0 30px rgba(201,1= 68,76,.08);
}
.pillar.active::before {
= background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), var(--blue),= transparent);
}
.pillar.= active::after {
opacity: 1;
}<= /td>

.pillar-h= ere-badge {
position: absolute; top: 1rem; right: 1rem;
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .48rem; font-weight= : 500;
letter-spacing: .25em; text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(--gold); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.5);
padding: .22rem .6rem; border-radius: 3px;
backgrou= nd: rgba(201,168,76,.08);
}

/* Click= able pillar link */
.pillar-link {
text-decoratio= n: none; color: inherit; cursor: pointer;
}
.pillar= -link:hover {
bor= der-color: rgba(14,165,233,.45);
border-top-color: rgba(14,16= 5,233,.65);
box-shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(14= ,165,233,.25),
= 0 0 40px rgba(14,165,233,.12);
}
.pillar-link:hove= r::before { opacity: 1; }
.pillar-link:hover::after { opacity:= 1; }

.pillar-icon {
font-size: = 2.4rem; margin-bottom: .8rem; display: block; line-height: 1;
= filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(14,165,233,.4));
}

/* Oswald for pillar name =E2=80=94 condensed prevents = wrapping */
.pillar-name {
font-family: var(--fon= t-condensed); font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 500;
letter-s= pacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(--gold-l= ight); white-space: nowrap;
line-height: 1.1;
}

.pillar-ro= le {
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .68rem; f= ont-weight: 300;
letter-spacing: .35em; text-transform: upper= case; color: var(--text-dim);
}

/* = Pillar description */
= .pillar-desc {
font-family:= var(--font-sans); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 300;
color= : var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.7; margin-top: .6rem; flex: 1;
= }

/* CTA line at bottom */
.pillar= -cta {
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .68rem= ; font-weight: 500;
letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: up= percase;
color: var(--blue); margin-top: 1.2rem; padding-top:= 1rem;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.15);
transition: color .2s, letter-spacing .2s;
display: flex= ; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;
}
.pillar-cta::a= fter { content: '\2192'; transition: transform .2s; }
.pillar:h= over .pillar-cta { color: var(--blue-bright); letter-spacing: .3em; }
.pillar:hover .pillar-cta::after { transform: translateX(4px); }
.pillar.active .pillar-cta { color: var(--gold); border-top-color:= rgba(201,168,76,.2); }
.pillar.active .pillar-cta::after { con= tent: ''; }
.pillar-coming .pillar-cta { color: var(--text-dim)= ; border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,.06); }
.pillar-coming .pi= llar-cta::after { content: ''; }

/* TARAPAD */
.tarapad { background: var(--dark); overflow: hidden; }
.tarapad-inner { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5r= em; align-items: center; }

.tarapad-badge {
display: inline-block; font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-s= ize: .6rem;
font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: .35em; text-tra= nsform: uppercase;
padding: .38rem 1rem; border: 1px solid va= r(--blue); color: var(--blue-bright); margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
= animation: badgePulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@k= eyframes badgePulse { 0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,0); } 50%= { box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(14,165,233,.35); } }

= .tarapad-features { margin-top: 2.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: co= lumn; gap: 1.1rem; }
<= /td> .feature-item {
display: fle= x; gap: 1.2rem; align-items: flex-start;
padding: 1.1rem; bor= der-left: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color .3s, background .= 3s;
}
.feature-item:hover { border-left-color: var(= --blue); background: rgba(14,165,233,.04); }
.feature-dot { wid= th: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--blue); flex: no= ne; margin-top: 6px; box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--blue); }

/* Oswald for feature headings */
.feature-text strong = {
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .95rem; font= -weight: 500;
}
/* Montserrat for feature body */
.feature-text span= { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .85rem; font-weight: 300; line= -height: 1.75; color: var(--text-dim); }

.tarapa= d-visual { position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; alig= n-items: center; min-height: 400px; }
.tarapad-court { width: 2= 70px; height: 390px; border: 2px solid rgba(14,165,233,.3); position: relat= ive; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(14,165,233,.03), transpare= nt); }
.court-line { position: absolute; background: rgba(14,1= 65,233,.2); }
.basket-goal { position: absolute; top: 6%; left: = 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 38px; height: 22px; border: 2.5px = solid var(--blue); border-bottom: none; box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(14,165,23= 3,.5); }
.laser-beam { position: absolute; bottom: 10%; left: 5= 0%; width: 2px; height: 190px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(255= ,69,0,.85), transparent); transform-origin: bottom center; transform: trans= lateX(-50%) rotate(-24deg); animation: laserPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; = filter: blur(.8px); }
= .laser-beam::after { content: ''; positio= n: absolute; top: 0; left: 50%; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%= ; background: var(--red-glow); transform: translate(-50%,-50%); box-shadow:= 0 0 14px var(--red-glow); }
@keyframes laserPulse { 0%,100% = { opacity: .55; } 50% { opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); } }

/* STATS */
<= /td> .stats { background: linear-gradient(135de= g, var(--dark-2), var(--dark-3)); padding: 6rem 4rem; }
.stats-= grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 2rem; text= -align: center; }
.stat-item { padding: 2rem; }

<= /td>
/* Cormorant for stat numbers =E2=80=94 dramatic high contrast = */
.stat-num {
font-family: var(--font-serif); fo= nt-size: clamp(3rem,5vw,5rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1;
= background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue-bright), var(--gold));
-webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transp= arent; background-clip: text;
letter-spacing: -.02em;
}

/* Oswald for stat labels */
= .stat-label { font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .72rem; font-= weight: 300; letter-spacing: .32em; color: var(--text-dim); margin-top: .8r= em; text-transform: uppercase; }

/* CTA */
.cta-section { background: var(--dark); text-align: center; padding:= 10rem 4rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.cta-secti= on::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transfor= m: translate(-50%,-50%); width: 600px; height: 600px; background: radial-gr= adient(ellipse, rgba(91,24,154,.1) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: no= ne; }
.cta-section .section-label { justify-content: center; = }
.cta-section .section-label::before { display: none; }
.cta-section .section-title { margin: 0 auto 1.5rem; text-align: cent= er; }

/* Montserrat for cta description */
.cta-desc { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 1rem; font-w= eight: 300; letter-spacing: .05em; color: var(--text-dim); margin-bottom: 3= rem; }

/* FOOTER */
footer { backgr= ound: var(--dark-2); padding: 4rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.= 1); }
.footer-inner { display: flex; justify-content: space-b= etween; align-items: flex-start; gap: 4rem; }
.footer-logo { he= ight: 68px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(14,165,233,.25)); }
.footer-links { display: flex; gap: 5rem; }

/= * Oswald for footer column headings */
.footer-col h4 { font-fa= mily: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .68rem; font-weight: 500; letter-sp= acing: .38em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue); margin-bottom:= 1.5rem; }
.footer-col ul { list-style: none; display: flex; fl= ex-direction: column; gap: .85rem; }

/* Montser= rat for footer links */
.footer-col a { font-family: var(--font= -sans); font-size: .84rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-dim); text-d= ecoration: none; transition: color .3s; letter-spacing: .04em; }
= .footer-col a:hover { color: var(--blue-bright); }

.footer-bottom { margin-top: 4rem; padding-top: 2rem; border-top: 1px = solid rgba(255,255,255,.04); display: flex; justify-content: space-between;= align-items: center; }

/* Montserrat for copyri= ght */
.footer-bottom p { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-= size: .74rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-dim); letter-spacing: .06= em; }
.footer-bottom span { color: var(--gold); font-weight: = 500; }

/* Oswald for domain */
.foo= ter-domain { font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .66rem; letter-= spacing: .28em; color: var(--text-dim); text-transform: uppercase; }

/* REVEAL */
.reveal { opacity: 0; transfo= rm: translateY(28px); transition: opacity .8s ease, transform .8s ease; }
.reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
/* Contact Form */
.form-group { display: flex; flex-dire= ction: column; gap: .4rem; text-align: left; }
.form-label {
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .62rem; font-wei= ght: 500;
letter-spacing: .3em; text-transform: uppercase; co= lor: var(--blue);
}
.form-input {
bac= kground: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
border: 1px solid rgba(14,165= ,233,.2);
border-top-color: rgba(14,165,233,.08);
= border-radius: 6px;
padding: .75rem 1rem;
co= lor: var(--text);
font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .= 85rem; font-weight: 300;
transition: border-color .2s, box-sh= adow .2s;
outline: none;
width: 100%; box-sizin= g: border-box;
backdr= op-filter: blur(4px);
= }
.form-input::placeholder { = color: var(--text-dim); opacity: .6; }
.form-input:focus {
border-color: rgba(14,165,233,.55);
box-shadow: 0 0= 0 3px rgba(14,165,233,.08), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(14,165,233,.1);
= background: rgba(14,165,233,.04);
}
.form-inpu= t option { background: #0A1628; color: var(--text); }
.form-tex= tarea { min-height: 120px; resize: vertical; }
#submitBtn { min= -width: 200px; }
#submitBtn:disabled { opacity: .5; cursor: not= -allowed; transform: none; }


@m= edia (max-width: 900px) {
nav { padding: 1rem 2rem; }
section { padding: 5rem 2rem; }
.about, .tarapad-inner= { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.about-visual { display: non= e; }
.services-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.ecosystem-pillars { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.stat= s-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); }
.footer-inne= r { flex-direction: column; }
.footer-links { flex-direction= : column; gap: 2rem; }
}

/* =E2=94= =80=E2=94=80 HAMBURGER MENU =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2= =94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94= =80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
.hamburger {
display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px;
= background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: .5rem; z-index: = 200;
}
.hamburger span {
display: blo= ck; width: 24px; height: 2px;
background: var(--text); borde= r-radius: 2px;
}
.hamburger.open span:nth-child(1) { transform: tra= nslateY(7px) rotate(45deg); }
.hamburger.open span:nth-child(2= ) { opacity: 0; transform: scaleX(0); }
.hamburger.open span:nt= h-child(3) { transform: translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg); }

.nav-mobile-menu {
display: none; position: fixed= ; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
background: rgba(4,12= ,24,.97); backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
z-index: 150; flex-dir= ection: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
= gap: 2rem;
}
.nav-mobile-menu.open { display: flex= ; }
.nav-mobile-menu a {
font-family: var(--font-= condensed); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 400;
letter-spaci= ng: .3em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text);
text= -decoration: none; transition: color .2s;
}
.nav-mo= bile-menu a:hover { color: var(--gold); }

/* =E2= =94=80=E2=94=80 ANIMATED STATS COUNTERS =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94= =80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2= =94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
.stat-num {
font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(2.8rem,5vw,4.2r= em);
font-weight: 300; line-height: 1;
backgrou= nd: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue-bright), var(--gold));
= -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
background-clip: text;
}
.stat-num[data-co= unt] { -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; }

/= * =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 PARTNERS MARQUEE =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2= =94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94= =80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
.partners-section { padding: 6re= m 4rem; background: var(--dark-2); overflow: hidden; }
.partner= s-track-wrap { overflow: hidden; mask-image: linear-gradient(to right, tran= sparent, black 15%, black 85%, transparent); }
.partners-track = {
display: flex; gap: 2rem; width: max-content;
= animation: marquee 28s linear infinite;
}
.partner= s-track:hover { animation-play-state: paused; }
@keyframes marq= uee { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); = } }
.partner-logo-pill {
flex-shrink: 0;
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 5= 00;
letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: = var(--text-dim);
padding: .9rem 2rem;
backgrou= nd: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(14,165,233,.07), rgba(201,168,76,.04));
border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.15);
border-r= adius: 50px;
transition: all .3s;
}
.= partner-logo-pill:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: rgba(14,165,233= ,.4); background: rgba(14,165,233,.1); }

/* =E2= =94=80=E2=94=80 PRESS SECTION =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2= =94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94= =80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
.press-section= { padding: 8rem 4rem; background: var(--dark-3); }
.press-gri= d { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 2rem; max-wid= th: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
.press-card {
padd= ing: 2.5rem 2rem; text-align: center;
background: linear-grad= ient(135deg, rgba(14,165,233,.06), rgba(201,168,76,.03));
bor= der: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.12);
border-radius: 12px;
transition: transform .3s, border-color .3s, box-shadow .3s;
}
.press-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); bor= der-color: rgba(14,165,233,.35); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.4), 0 = 0 30px rgba(14,165,233,.08); }
.press-icon { font-size: 2.2rem;= margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
.press-card-title { font-family: var(= --font-condensed); font-size: .9rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .18e= m; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: .8rem; }
.press-card-desc { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .83= rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.7; margin-bot= tom: 1.5rem; }
display: inline-block= ; font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .65rem;
font= -weight: 500; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;
= color: var(--blue); text-decoration: none;
padding: .55rem= 1.4rem; border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.35);
border-radiu= s: 4px; transition: all .2s;
}
.press-btn:hover {= background: rgba(14,165,233,.1); border-color: var(--blue); color: #fff; }=

.news-section { padding: 8rem 4rem; ba= ckground: var(--dark); }
.news-grid { display: grid; grid-templ= ate-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 2rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }=
.news-card {
padding: 2.5rem; position: relative= ; overflow: hidden;
background: linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(= 14,165,233,.05) 0%, rgba(4,12,24,.8) 100%);
border: 1px solid= rgba(14,165,233,.1);
= border-radius: 12px;
tran= sition: transform .3s, border-color .3s, box-shadow .3s;
disp= lay: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .8rem;
}
.n= ews-card::before {
content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; l= eft: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
background: linear-gradient(90= deg, var(--blue), var(--gold));
transform: scaleX(0); transfo= rm-origin: left; transition: transform .4s;
}
.news= -card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: rgba(14,165,233,.3= ); box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5); }
.news-card:hover::= before { transform: scaleX(1); }
.news-tag {
disp= lay: inline-block; font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .6rem;
font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .25em; text-transform: upperc= ase;
color: var(--blue-bright); background: rgba(14,165,233,.= 1);
padding: .25rem .75rem; border-radius: 20px; align-self: = flex-start;
}
.news-date { font-family: var(--font-= condensed); font-size: .65rem; letter-spacing: .2em; color: var(--text-dim)= ; text-transform: uppercase; }
.news-headline { font-family: va= r(--font-display); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text)= ; line-height: 1.5; flex: 1; }
.news-excerpt { font-family: var= (--font-sans); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-dim);= line-height: 1.75; }
= .news-readmore { font-family: var(--font-= condensed); font-size: .68rem; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: upperc= ase; color: var(--gold); text-decoration: none; margin-top: auto; transitio= n: color .2s; align-self: flex-start; }
.news-readmore:hover { = color: var(--gold-light); }

/* =E2=94=80=E2=94= =80 SERVICES TABS =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2= =94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94= =80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2= =94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
.services-tabs { display: = flex; gap: .5rem; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; flex-wrap: = wrap; }
.service-tab {
font-family: var(--font-co= ndensed); font-size: .68rem; font-weight: 500;
letter-spacing= : .2em; text-transform: uppercase;
padding: .55rem 1.4rem; cu= rsor: pointer;
border-radius: 50px; color: va= r(--text-dim);
}
.service-tab:hover { color: var(--text); border-color: rgba(14,165,233,= .4); background: rgba(14,165,233,.07); }
.service-tab.active { = color: var(--dark); background: var(--blue); border-color: var(--blue); box= -shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(14,165,233,.3); }
.service-panel { displ= ay: none; }
.service-panel.active { display: grid; grid-templat= e-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px,1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; }
<= br>
/* =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 TARAPAD EXPANDED =E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2= =94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94= =80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
.tarapad-specs= { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: 1.5rem; margin= -top: 3rem; }
padding: 1.8rem; text-= align: center;
border-radius: 10px; transition: = all .3s;
}
.spec-card:hover { background: rgba(14,1= 65,233,.08); border-color: rgba(14,165,233,.3); transform: translateY(-4px)= ; }
.spec-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: .8rem; }
.spec-label { font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .65re= m; letter-spacing: .25em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--blue); ma= rgin-bottom: .4rem; }
= .spec-value { font-family: var(--font-dis= play); font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--text); }

= /* =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 LIVE CHAT WIDGET =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2= =94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94= =80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
.chat-bubble {
pos= ition: fixed; bottom: 2rem; right: 2rem; z-index: 999;
width:= 58px; height: 58px; border-radius: 50%;
background: linear-g= radient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--blue-dim));
border: none; = cursor: pointer;
box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(14,165,233,.45),= 0 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,.3);
animation: chatPulse 3s ease-i= n-out infinite;
}
@keyframes chatPulse {
0%,100% { box-shadow: 0 4px = 24px rgba(14,165,233,.45), 0 0 0 0 rgba(14,165,233,.3); }
50%= { box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(14,165,233,.45), 0 0 0 12px rgba(14,165,233,= 0); }
}
= .chat-panel {
position: fix= ed; bottom: 6.5rem; right: 2rem; z-index: 998;
width: 320px; = background: var(--dark-3);
border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,= .25); border-radius: 16px;
box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0= ,.6);
transform: scale(.9) translateY(20px); opacity: 0;
transition: all .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
poin= ter-events: none; overflow: hidden;
}
.chat-panel.o= pen { transform: scale(1) translateY(0); opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }=
.chat-header {
padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem; backgroun= d: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(14,165,233,.15), rgba(201,168,76,.08));
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.15);
dis= play: flex; align-items: center; gap: .8rem;
}
.cha= t-avatar { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: linea= r-gradient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--purple-light)); display: flex; align-= items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1rem; }
.cha= t-name { font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .8rem; letter-spaci= ng: .15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text); }
.ch= at-status { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .7rem; color: #4ade80= ; }
.chat-body { padding: 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction= : column; gap: 1rem; }
.chat-msg {
padding: .9rem= 1.1rem; border-radius: 12px; border-top-left-radius: 4px;
ba= ckground: rgba(14,165,233,.1); border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.12);
font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 30= 0; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.6;
}
.chat-op= tions { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .5rem; }
.c= hat-opt {
padding: .65rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; text-alig= n: left;
background: rgba(255,255,255,.04); border: 1px solid= rgba(14,165,233,.15);
color: var(--text-dim); font-family: v= ar(--font-sans); font-size: .78rem;
cursor: pointer; transiti= on: all .2s;
}
.chat-opt:hover { background: rgba(1= 4,165,233,.1); border-color: rgba(14,165,233,.4); color: var(--text); }

/* =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 RESPONSIVE UPDATES =E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2= =94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94= =80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
@media (max-width: 900p= x) {
.hamburger { display: flex; }
.nav-links, = .nav-cta { display: none; }
.press-grid, .news-grid { grid-t= emplate-columns: 1fr; }
.tarapad-specs { grid-template-colum= ns: 1fr 1fr; }
.press-section, .news-section { padding: 5rem 2rem; }
}
@media (max-width: 600px) {
.tarapad-spe= cs { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}



/* =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 LOCATIONS SECTION= =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
.locations-section { background: var(--= dark); padding: 8rem 4rem; }
.locations-section .section-lab= el { justify-content: center; }
.locations-section .section-la= bel::before { display: none; }
.locations-section .section-tit= le { margin: 0 auto 1rem; text-align: center; }
.locations-int= ro { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 300;
color: var(--text-dim); text-align: center; max-width: 520px; = margin: 0 auto 4rem; line-height: 1.8; }

.loca= tions-grid {
gap: 2rem; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;
}

.location-card {
positi= on: relative;
backgro= und: linear-gradient(145deg,
rgba(255,255,255,.055) 0%,<= /td>
rgba(14,165,233,.03) 60%,
rgba(0,0,0,.25)= 100%
);
border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,= .08);
border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,.15);
= border-left-color: rgba(255,255,255,.1);
border-radius: 1= 6px;
backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
box-sha= dow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.08), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
transition: transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease;
= overflow: hidden;
<= /td> }
.location-card::before {
content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; he= ight: 2px;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, v= ar(--gold), transparent);
opacity: 0; transition: opacity .3= s;
}
.location-card:hover { transform: translateY= (-6px);
box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(201,168,76,.15), 0 20= px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.5), 0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,.06); }
.loca= tion-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }

.locat= ion-hq-badge {
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .52rem; font= -weight: 500;
color: var(--gold); background: rgba(201,168,76,.1);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3); padding: .22rem .75rem; = border-radius: 20px;
= }
.location-flag { font-size= : 2rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; display: block; }
.location-city = {
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: 1.3rem; fon= t-weight: 600;
}
.locati= on-country {
= color: var(--blue-bright); letter-spaci= ng: .08em; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}
.location-rol= e {
font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .82rem; font-w= eight: 300;
color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.7;
}
.location-divider {
width: 32px; heigh= t: 1px; background: rgba(201,168,76,.4); margin: 1rem 0;
}
.location-contact {
font-family: var(--font-conde= nsed); font-size: .62rem; font-weight: 400;
letter-spacing: = .2em; text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(--text-dim);
}
.location-contact a { color: var(--blue); text-dec= oration: none; }
.location-contact a:hover { color: var(--blue= -bright); }

@media (max-width: 800px) {
.locations-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.lo= cations-section { padding: 5rem 2rem; }
}

/* =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 PRODUCTS SECTION =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 */
.products-section { background: var(--dark-2); padding: 8rem 4rem; = }
.products-section .section-label { justify-content: center; = }
.products-section .section-label::before { display: none; }<= /td>
.products-section .section-title { margin: 0 auto 1rem; text-a= lign: center; }
.products-intro { font-family: var(--font-sans= ); font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 300;
color: var(--text-di= m); text-align: center; max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto 4rem; line-height:= 1.8; }

.products-grid {
displa= y: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
gap: 2rem; m= ax-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;
}

.app-card {
= background: linear-gradient(145deg,
rgba(255,255,255,.065)= 0%,
rgba(14,165,233,.04) 60%,
rgba(0,0= ,0,.3) 100%
);
border: 1px solid rgba(255,25= 5,255,.1);
border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,.2);
border-left-color: rgba(255,255,255,.14);
border-botto= m-color: rgba(0,0,0,.3);
border-right-color: rgba(0,0,0,.2);=
border-radius: 20px;
backdrop-filter: blur(1= 2px);
box-shadow:
inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,2= 55,255,.12),
ov= erflow: hidden;
transition: transform .35s cubic-bezier(.4,0= ,.2,1),
box-shadow .35s, border-color .35s;
}

.app-card::before {
= content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--blue), v= ar(--gold), transparent);
opacity: 0; transition: opacity .3= 5s;
}
.app-card:hover { transform: translateY(-10= px);
border-color: rgba(14,165,233,.4); border-top-color: = rgba(14,165,233,.6);
= box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(14,165,2= 33,.2), 0 28px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.55), 0 0 40px rgba(14,165,233,.1);
}
.app-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }

=
/* Status badge */
.app-status {
= position: absolute; top: 1.2rem; right: 1.2rem;
font-family:= var(--font-condensed); font-size: .52rem; font-weight: 600;
= letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;
padding= : .28rem .75rem; border-radius: 20px;
}
.app-stat= us.launched {
}
.app= -status.coming-soon {
color: var(--gold); background: rgba(2= 01,168,76,.1); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.35);
}

.app-icon-wrap {
width: 64px; height= : 64px; border-radius: 16px; margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
display= : flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 2rem;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(14,165,233,.15), rgba(2= 01,168,76,.08));
border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.2);
box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(14,165,233,.15);
}

.app-name {
font-family: var(--font= -condensed); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 600;
letter-spa= cing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(--gold-li= ght); margin-bottom: .4rem; white-space: nowrap;
}
= .app-tagline {
font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .= 78rem; font-weight: 400;
color: var(--blue-bright); letter-s= pacing: .06em; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}
.app-desc= {
font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .84rem; font-we= ight: 300;
color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.78; flex: = 1; margin-bottom: 1.8rem;
}
.app-tags { display: = flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .5rem; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; }
.a= pp-tag {
font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .58r= em; font-weight: 500;
letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform:= uppercase;
padding: .22rem .75rem; border-radius: 20px;
color: var(--text-dim); background: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
}
.app-cta {
display: inline-flex; align-items: center; = gap: .5rem; margin-top: auto;
font-family: var(--font-conde= nsed); font-size: .68rem; font-weight: 500;
letter-spacing: = .22em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none;
pad= ding: .65rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 8px;
transition: all .22= s;
}
.app-cta.live {
color: #fff; = background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blue), var(--blue-dim));
border: 1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.4);
box-shadow: 0 = 4px 20px rgba(14,165,233,.2);
}
.app-cta.live:ho= ver { box-shadow: 0 6px 28px rgba(14,165,233,.4); filter: brightness(1.1); = transform: translateX(2px); }
.app-cta.soon {
= color: var(--gold); background: rgba(201,168,76,.08);
border= : 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);
}
.app-cta.soon:= hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,.15); border-color: rgba(201,168,76,.55= ); }

@media (max-width: 900px) {
= .products-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.produc= ts-section { padding: 5rem 2rem; }
}

/* =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 FOUNDER / LEADERSHIP SECTION =E2=94=80=E2=94=80 *= /
.founder-section { background: var(--dark-2); }
= .founder-inner { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.8fr; gap: 6re= m; align-items: center; }
.founder-photo-wrap { position: rela= tive; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; }
.founder-photo { width: 100%; max-width: 340px; border-radius: 4px; = position: relative; z-index: 1;
filter: drop-shadow(0 0 40px= rgba(14,165,233,.2)); object-fit: cover; aspect-ratio: 1/1; object-positio= n: top; }
.founder-photo-ring { position: absolute; width: 105= %; height: 105%; border-radius: 6px;
border: 1px solid rgba(= 14,165,233,.25); animation: ringRotate 18s linear infinite; }
= .founder-title-tag { font-family: var(--font-condensed); font-size: .8rem; = letter-spacing: .22em;
text-transform: uppercase; color: var= (--gold); margin-bottom: 1.8rem; display: block; }
.founder-= bio p { margin-bottom: 1.2rem; color: var(--text-dim); line-height: 1.8; fo= nt-size: .95rem; }
.founder-bio p strong { color: var(--blue-b= right); font-weight: 600; }
.founder-credentials { display: gr= id; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.2rem; margin-top: 2.5rem; }
.credential-item { display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-sta= rt; background: rgba(14,165,233,.05);
border: 1px solid rgba= (14,165,233,.1); border-radius: 8px; padding: 1rem 1.2rem; }
.= cred-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; line-height: 1; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cred-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .3rem; }
.cred-text strong { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .8rem;= font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-bright); letter-spacing: .02em; }
.cred-text span { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: .72rem= ; font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-dim); }
@media (max-widt= h: 900px) {
.founder-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap= : 3rem; }
.founder-photo { max-width: 220px; }
= .founder-credentials { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
</style>
</head>
<= body>

<div= class=3D"cursor" id= =3D"cursor"></div>
<= ;div class=3D"cursor-ring" = id=3D"cursorRing"></div>

<!-- Mobile Menu -->
= <div class<= /span>=3D"nav-mobile-menu" id=3D"mobileMenu">
= <a href=3D"#about" onclick=3D"c= loseMobile()">About</a>

<a href=3D"#products" oncl= ick=3D"closeMobile()">= ;Products</a>
<a href= =3D"#lo= cations" onclick=3D"closeMobile()">Offices</a>
&= lt;a href=3D"#news" onclick=3D"clos= eMobile()">News</a><= /td>
<a href=3D"#press" onclick=3D"= closeMobile()">Press<= span class=3D"html-tag"></a>
<a href=3D"#contact" onclick=3D"closeMobile()" style=3D"color:var(--gold);"><= /span>Get In Touch</a>
</div>

<!-- Live Chat Widget -->
<button class= =3D"chat-bubble" id=3D"chatBubble" aria-label=3D"Chat with us">= =F0=9F=92=AC</button>
<div class=3D"chat-panel" id=3D"= chatPanel">
<di= v class=3D"chat-header">
<div class=3D"<= span class=3D"html-attribute-value">chat-avatar">=E2=9A=A1= </div>
<div>
&l= t;div class=3D"chat-name">TaraTech Support</div>
<div class=3D"chat-status">=E2=97=8F Online</div>
</div>
</div><= /span>
<div class=3D"chat-bod= y">
= <div class=3D"chat-msg">Hey! =F0=9F=91=8B Welcome to TaraTech. H= ow can we help you today?</div>
<div class=3D"chat-options">
<= /td> <button class=3D"chat-opt" onclick=3D"chatSelect('tarapad')"&= gt;=F0=9F=8F=80 I want to learn about TaraPad</button>
<butt= on class=3D"chat-opt" oncli= ck=3D"chatSelect('partner')">=F0=9F=A4=9D I'm interested in partnering</button>
&l= t;button class=3D"chat-opt" onclick=3D"chatSelect('contact= ')">=F0=9F=93=A7 Connect me with your team</button>
<= ;/div>
</div><= /td>
</div>

class=3D"her= o-logo" id=3D"heroLogo">
<p class= =3D"hero-tagline">=E2= =80=94 The Engine of T=C3=A1raDome Entertainment Group =E2=80=94</p>
<= ;h1 class=3D"hero-headline">Redefining the<br>Infrastructure of&l= t;br>Entertainment.</h1>
<p class=3D"hero-sub"&= gt;Where <span>Technology</span> Powers the Art</p>
<div class=3D"hero-actions">

<div class=3D"divider"></div><= /span>

<section class=3D"about" id=3D"about">
<div class=3D"about-text reveal"><= /span>
<p class=3D"section-= label">Our Story</p>=
<h2 class=3D"section-title= ">Built to Power the Future of Entertainment</h2>
<= p>TaraTech is the <strong>t= echnology backbone</strong> of T=C3= =A1raDome Entertainment Group =E2=80=94 a division engineered to build, man= age, and innovate the digital infrastructure that makes world-class music a= nd film possible.</p>
= <p>Founded in <strong>Atlanta, Georgia</strong= >, T=C3=A1raDome Entertainment Group was conceived with a singula= r vision: to bring every creative sector of the entertainment world under o= ne roof. From <strong>1995</strong>, when Founder & CEO E. Kiszo Ugokw= e operated his boutique fashion line, to <stron= g>2004</strong> when T=C3= =A1radomeFilms began producing and distributing motion pictures across Afri= ca, to the <strong>2021</strong> launch of T=C3=A1radomeMusik =E2=80=94 th= e group has been methodically assembling the infrastructure of a global ent= ertainment institution.</p>
<p>In = <strong>2006</strong>, K= iszo co-created the African Roving Film School in partnership with USC Film= School and the Hollywood Film Institute, training the next generation of A= frican filmmakers in script writing, production, and post-production. It is= from this legacy of <strong>ownershi= p, excellence, and technology</strong> that TaraTech was born =E2=80=94 the engine that powers it all.</p>
&l= t;p>We leverage AI, data analytics, blockchain-based rights track= ing, and proprietary platform development to empower creators, amplify Afri= can narratives, and deliver premium entertainment to the world.</p>
</= div>
<div class=3D"about-ring ring-1"></div>

AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA= AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAf/2Q=3D=3D" alt=3D"TaraTech" class=3D"<= span class=3D"html-attribute-value">about-logo" id=3D"aboutLogo= ">

<= br>
<div class=3D"divider"></div>

<section class=3D"services" id=3D"services">
<div class=3D"services-header reveal">
<p class=3D"section-label"= >What We Build</p>
<h2 = class=3D"section-title" = style=3D"margin:0 auto;">Core Competencies</h2>
<= /div>
<div class=3D"services-grid reveal">
<div class=3D"service-card"><div class=3D"service-num">01</div><span class=3D"service-icon">=F0=9F=8E=AC= </span><h3 class=3D"service-t= itle">Streaming & DRM</h3&= gt;<p class=3D"service-desc"= >Secure, high-performance streaming infrastructure with digital r= ights management for music and film distribution across all major platforms= .</p></di= v>
<div class=3D"service-card"><div class=3D"service-num">03</div><span class=3D"service-icon">=E2=98=81=EF=B8=8F</span><h3 class=3D"service= -title">Cloud Infrastructure</= h3><p class=3D"service-desc">Enterprise-grade cloud solutions for storing, managing, and d= elivering raw footage, audio masters, and production assets securely.</p></div>
<div class=3D"servic= e-card"><div class=3D"ser= vice-num">04</div><span class=3D"service-icon">=F0=9F=93=B1</span><h3 class=3D"service-title">Custom Platfo= rms</h3><= p class=3D"service-desc">Bespoke artist portals, clie= nt management systems, and mobile applications built from the ground up for= the entertainment vertical.</p></div>
<div class=3D"service-card"><div class=3D"service-num">05</div><span class=3D"service-icon">=E2=9A=A1<= /span><h3 class=3D"service-title= ">Sports Tech</h3><p class=3D"service-desc">P= roprietary athletic training technology =E2=80=94 including TaraPad =E2=80= =94 that uses AI, computer vision, and biomechanics to elevate performance.= </p></div= >
<div class=3D"s= ervice-card"><div class=3D"service-num">06</div><span c= lass=3D"service-icon">= ;=F0=9F=94=90</span><h3 class=3D"<= span class=3D"html-attribute-value">service-title">Cyberse= curity</h3>&= lt;p class=3D"service-desc">Protecting intellectual p= roperty, digital assets, and sensitive data for the T=C3=A1raDome group and= its talent roster with enterprise-level security.= </p></div>
= </div>
</section>

<div class=3D"divider"></div>

<section class=3D"ecosystem" id=3D"ecosystem"= >
<div class=3D"rev= eal">
<p class=3D"section-label">The T=C3=A1raDome Group</p>
<= ;h2 class=3D"section-title">One Ecosystem.<br>Three Pillars.</= h2>
</div>
<di= v class=3D"ecosystem-pillars reveal">
= <a href=3D"http= s://www.taradomemusik.com" target=3D"_blank" rel=3D"no= opener" class=3D"pillar pillar-link">
<span class=3D"pillar-icon= ">=F0=9F=8E=B5</span>
<div class=3D"pillar-name">T=C3=A1radomeMusik</div>
<div class=3D"pillar-ro= le">The Sound</div><= /td>
<div class=3D"pillar-desc= ">Artist development, masters ownership, global distributi= on and catalog acquisition =E2=80=94 amplifying African voices worldwide.</div>
<div class=3D"pillar-cta">Visit Site</div>
</a>
<div class=3D"pillar active">
<span class=3D"pillar-here-badge">You A= re Here</span>
<span class=3D"pillar-icon">= =E2=9A=99=EF=B8=8F</span>
= <div = class=3D"pillar-name">= ;TaraTech</div>
= <div cla= ss=3D"pillar-role">The Foundation</div>
= <div = class=3D"pillar-desc">= ;The technology engine powering every division =E2=80=94 from stream= ing infrastructure and DRM to AI-driven sports tech and immersive experienc= es.</div>
<div class=3D"= pillar-cta">Home Base= </div>
</div>
<= div class=3D"pillar pillar-coming">
= <span class= =3D"pillar-icon">=F0=9F=8E=AC</span>
= <div cla= ss=3D"pillar-name">T=C3=A1radomeFilms</div>
<div class=3D"pillar-role= ">The Vision</div>
<div class=3D"pillar-desc"= >Motion picture production and distribution since 2004 =E2=80=94 = telling African stories with global reach, from feature films to streaming = series.</div>
<div class=3D"pillar-cta">Comi= ng Soon</div>
</div>
</div>
= </section>

4I84rawaZKImChlsoQpw7QBb0hGZmX0FJeZUkHzHMFoE45KIXLOAr2G9xzt6GLOUodltqzvSRe5= ETivGITfnyVKYaEwkKSAD7QxRLFfesqFitJt7xY3qWGlkoPhP6sILlx3iV7bKSeYTixpjPTUyXZ= NLSz4mVFs+3I/rEu60ErBScGK4UGnVtRuUodza+DFgJ3ISRmKyYb0McUnYLjHp0jp8Wc3gA3BBg= wAJO4evWBeOJwcZjvEIZwmxN4EAwIBAA6x0jF4ECAACOwIEAwjjobBUryhqylU46lZw0k3A/aMC= BDAerFzcQkpFxfygQIAESbKvYiFXWkzTRSev5eRgQIcfYmdXKbmicd7ySIXknytspP1iBAi/0VD= 1tzvE+owQYYVKnIU0p1k904Of2T7iBAhtaIj6T9tMqUUEOhOywze56fhFibSEoJWcjAT5QIEQix= sDiQtIBGT5QymWFNg4uIECJsSISvy5clUTCfqbIOPKHkg8JiVScZF4ECKJ+y1ehc/SDxaDJJ4/n= AgREYCIF79IECAAvOIECBCEz/9k=3D" alt= =3D"E. Kiszo Ugokwe =E2=80=94 F= ounder & CEO, TaraTech" clas= s=3D"founder-photo"><= /span>
</div>
<div class=3D"founder-bio reveal">
<p class=3D"section-label">The Visionary&= lt;/p>
<h2 class=3D"section-title" style= =3D"font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);">E. Kiszo Ugokwe</h2><= /td>
<p class=3D"founder-title= -tag">Founder &amp; CEO &mdash; T=C3=A1raDome Ente= rtainment Group</p>
= <p>A child actor turned <strong>Electrical &amp; Electronics Enginee= r</strong> with an MBA, Kiszo Ugokwe = has spent three decades at the intersection of creativity and technology. H= e founded T=C3=A1radomeFilms in <strong>2004</strong>, producing and distr= ibuting motion pictures across Africa, and in <= strong>2006</strong> co-cre= ated the African Roving Film School in partnership with USC and the Hollywo= od Film Institute Instructors.</p>
<p>His vision was alwa= ys singular: build an institution =E2=80=94 not just a company =E2=80=94 wh= ere <strong>fashion, music, film, and= technology</strong> converge under o= ne roof. T=C3=A1radomeMusik launched in 2021, and TaraTech followed as the = technological backbone that makes it all possible.= </p>
<p>Kiszo operates at the intersection of <strong&= gt;African creative excellence and global industry standards</strong>, building the infrastructure that e= nsures African creativity is not exported as raw talent, but owned, scaled,= and institutionalized through African-led global enterprises.</p>
&= lt;div class=3D"founder-credentials">
= <div cl= ass=3D"credential-item"&= gt;<div class=3D"cred-icon"&= gt;=F0=9F=8E=93</div><div class=3D= "cred-text"><strong>BSc Electrical &amp; Electronics E= ngineering</strong><span>Foundation in systems, infrastructure &amp; t= echnology</span></div></div>
<div class=3D"credential-item<= /span>"><div class=3D"cred-icon<= /span>">=F0=9F=93=8A</div><= span class=3D"html-tag"><div class=3D"cred-text"><= span class=3D"html-tag"><strong>Master of Business Administrat= ion</strong>= <span>Strategic leadership &amp; enterprise development</span></div= ></div>
= <div class<= /span>=3D"credential-item"><= /span><div = class=3D"cred-icon"><= /span>=F0=9F=8E=AC</div><div class=3D"<= span class=3D"html-attribute-value">cred-text"><strong>20+ Years in Entertainment</strong><span>Film production, distribution &amp; artist development</span></div><= span class=3D"html-tag"></div>
<div class=3D"<= span class=3D"html-attribute-value">credential-item"><div class=3D"cred-icon">=F0= =9F=8C=8D</div><div class=3D"cred-text"><strong>Pan-African Distribution Networks</strong><span>E= xclusive territorial rights across the African continent</span></div></div>
</div>
</div= >
</div>
</section>

<div class=3D"divider"></div>

<section = class=3D"tarapad" id=3D"tarapad">
<d= iv class=3D"tarapad-inner">
<div class=3D"= reveal">
= <span = class=3D"tarapad-badge"&= gt;Proprietary Technology</span>
<p class=3D"section-la= bel">Innovation Spotlight</p&g= t;
<h2 class=3D"se= ction-title">TaraPad: The Future of Athletic Training</h2>
<div class=3D"tarapad-features">
= <div class=3D"feature-item"= ><div class=3D"feature-dot"></div><div class=3D"feature-text"><strong>Smart Court Recognition</strong><span>Autom= atically configures for Youth, NCAA, and NBA regulation dimensions.</span></div><= /span></div>
<div class=3D"feature-item">= <div class<= /span>=3D"feature-dot"></div><= div class=3D"feature-text">&= lt;strong>Laser Trajectory Guidance</= strong><span>Calculates opt= imal shooting angle and torque, then projects a laser beam to guide the pla= yer.</span>&= lt;/div></div>
= <div class=3D"feature-item"&= gt;<div class=3D"feature-dot= "></div><div class=3D"feature-text"><strong>AI Learn Mode</st= rong><span>Captures shootin= g style, release force, speed, and accuracy to generate a personalized trai= ning program.</span></div></div>
<div class=3D"feature-item= "><div class=3D"feature-d= ot"></div><div class=3D"= feature-text"><strong>Wearable & Mobile Integration</strong><sp= an>Syncs vital stats via Bluetooth and WiFi to wearables and mobi= le devices in real time.</span></div></div>=
</div>
</div>
<div class=3D"tarapad-visual reveal">=
<div class=3D"tar= apad-court">
= <div class=3D"court-line court-center"></div>
<div class=3D"court-line court-paint"></div>
<div class=3D"basket-goal"></div>
<= ;div class=3D"laser-beam">&l= t;/div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<!-- PRODUCTS / APPS -->
<section class= =3D"products-section" id=3D"products">
<di= v class=3D"reveal" style=3D"text-align:center;">=
<p class=3D"section= -label">What We Ship</p>
<h2 class=3D"section= -title">Our Products</h2>
<p class=3D"products= -intro">Proprietary applications built and launched by Tar= aTech =E2=80=94 spanning fitness, lifestyle, and elite athletic performance= .</p>
</div>
<div class=3D"products-grid">

= <div class= =3D"app-card reveal">=
<span class=3D"ap= p-status coming-soon">Coming Soon= </span>
= <div class=3D"app-icon-wrap">=F0=9F=92=A1</div>
<div <= span class=3D"html-attribute-name">class=3D"app-name">MiiQ FitFinder</div>
<div <= span class=3D"html-attribute-name">class=3D"app-tagline">Transform Your Life Goals Into A= ctionable Vision.</div>
= <p clas= s=3D"app-desc">MiiQ FitFinder is a premium personality assessment and career guidance pla= tform for professionals aged 22&ndash;45 seeking clarity and direction.= Answer three fundamental questions &mdash; Experiences, Growth, and Co= ntribution &mdash; and the app maps your unique psychological profile f= rom 12 archetypes, generates a personalized interactive vision board, and d= elivers 144 industry-specific career recommendations tailored to who you ac= tually are. Outputs include a professional multi-page PDF report and social= sharing tools to declare your path to the world.&= lt;/p>
<div class=3D"app-tags">
<span class=3D"app-tag">Personality Assessment<= span class=3D"html-tag"></span>
<span class=3D"= app-tag">Career Guida= nce</span>
<span class= =3D"app-tag">Vision B= oard</span>
<span class=3D"app-tag">PDF Rep= orts</span>
<span class=3D"app-tag">Team Da= shboard</span>
</div>
<a href=3D"#contact" class=3D"app-cta soon">Join Waitlist &rarr;</a>
<= ;/div>

&l= t;div class=3D"app-card reveal">
<span class=3D"app-status coming-soon"= >Coming Soon</span>
<div class=3D"app-icon-wrap">=F0=9F=8F=86</div>
<div class=3D"app-name= ">The Elite Athlete</div>
<div class=3D"app-tagline<= /span>">Your Sport. Your Position. Your Peak.</div>
<p class=3D"app-desc">The Elite Athlete is an ultra-premiu= m performance management platform built for serious competitors. Athletes s= et up their profile with weight, height, sport, and position &mdash; an= d receive fully customized nutrition plans, position-specific workout progr= ams, and sport-relevant injury recovery protocols. A built-in journal, cale= ndar planner, progress tracker, and autosave system keep every athlete on c= ourse. Every plan &mdash; meals, workouts, recovery, and progress notes= &mdash; is downloadable, printable, and shareable with coaches and tra= iners. Available for football, basketball, soccer, hockey, volleyball, and = more.</p>
<div class=3D"= app-tags">
<span class=3D"app-tag">= ;Nutrition & Meal Plans</span>
<span class=3D"a= pp-tag">Workout Programs</span= >
<span class=3D"app-tag">Injury Recovery</= span>
<span class=3D"app-tag">Progress Tracking</span>
<span = class=3D"app-tag">Journal & Calendar</span>
</div>
<a href=3D"#contact" class=3D"app-cta so= on">Join Waitlist &rarr;</= a>

</section>

<= span class=3D"html-tag"><p class=3D"section-label reveal" style=3D"justify-content:center;">Latest</p>
<h2 = class=3D"section-title reveal" style=3D"margin:0 auto 3rem= ;">News & Updates</h2><= /span>

<div cla= ss=3D"news-grid">
<article class=3D"news-= card reveal">
&l= t;div class=3D"news-tag">Launch</div>
<div class=3D"news-date">March 2026= </div>
<= /td> <h3 class=3D"news-headline">TaraTech Officially Launches as the= Technology Division of T=C3=A1raDome Entertainment Group</h3>
<p <= span class=3D"html-attribute-name">class=3D"news-excerpt">Atlanta-based TaraTech goes liv= e, announcing its full suite of entertainment technology services including= streaming infrastructure, immersive tech, and proprietary sports training = platform TaraPad.</p>
= <a href=3D"mailto:hello@taratechent.com?subject=3DPress Inquiry<= /a>" class=3D"news-readmore">Press Inquiries =E2=86= =92</a>
</article>
= <article class=3D"news-card reveal">
= <div cl= ass=3D"news-tag">Product</div>
<div class=3D"news-date">Com= ing Soon</div>
<h3 class= =3D"news-headline">Ta= raPad Beta Program: Apply to Be Among the First Athletic Programs to Train = with AI Trajectory Guidance</h3>
<p class=3D"news-excerpt">TaraTech is opening a limited beta for TaraPad =E2=80=94 our = AI-powered basketball training mat that uses laser trajectory guidance and = computer vision to transform how athletes develop their shot.</p>
&l= t;a href=3D"#contact" class=3D"n= ews-readmore">Apply for Beta =E2=86=92</a>
</article= >
<article class=3D"news-card reveal">
<div class=3D"news-tag">Ecosystem</div>
<div class=3D"news-date">2026</div>
<h3 <= span class=3D"html-attribute-name">class=3D"news-headline">Building the Infrastructure of= Entertainment: How TaraTech Powers the T=C3=A1raDome Group</h3>
<p= class=3D"news-excerpt">From secure streaming pipelin= es to custom artist portals, TaraTech is the silent engine behind every T= =C3=A1raDome project. A behind-the-scenes look at the technology stack powe= ring Atlanta's newest entertainment group.</p&g= t;
<a href=3D"#about" cl= ass=3D"news-readmore">= ;Learn More =E2=86=92</a>
</article>
</div>
</section>

<= ;section class=3D"locations-section" id=3D"locations">

= <p clas= s=3D"locations-intro">= ;TaraTech operates across three continents =E2=80=94 connecting Atla= nta's tech corridor with Africa's creative capital and London's global medi= a hub.</p>

<div class=3D"location-card revea= l">

</div>

<span class=3D"location-flag">=F0=9F=87=B3= =F0=9F=87=AC</span>
= <div class<= /span>=3D"location-city">Lagos</div>
<div class=3D"location-country">Nigeria, West Africa</div>
<div class=3D"location-role">African operations hub serving the continent's fastest-growin= g entertainment and technology market. Leading partnerships, distribution, = and creative talent across West Africa.</div>= ;
<div class=3D"lo= cation-divider"></div>
<div class=3D"location= -contact"><a href=3D"mailto:lagos@taratechent.com">lagos@tara= techent.com</a></div>
</div>=

<div class=3D"location-card reveal">
<span class=3D"location-flag">= =F0=9F=87=AC=F0=9F=87=A7</span>
<div class=3D"location-city">London</div>
<div class=3D"location-country">England, United Kingdom</div>= ;
<div class=3D"lo= cation-role">European and international business developme= nt office. Bridging T=C3=A1raDome's African creative assets with global med= ia, streaming, and entertainment industry networks.</div>
= <div class=3D"location-divider"></= div>
</div>

</div>
</section><= /span>

<div class=3D"divider"></div>

<section class=3D"cta-section" id=3D"<= span class=3D"html-attribute-value">contact">
= <div class= =3D"reveal">
<p class=3D"section-label">Work With Us</p>
<h2 class=3D"section-title">Ready to Build<br>Somet= hing Legendary?</h2>
<= span class=3D"html-tag"><p class=3D"cta-desc">Whet= her you're a partner, client, or talent =E2=80=94 let's talk about what Tar= aTech can build for you.</p>

<form id=3D"contact= Form" action=3D"https://formspree.io/f/xyknkdwa" method=3D"POST" style=3D"max-width:520px;margin:3rem auto 0;displ= ay:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem;">
= <div style= =3D"display:grid;grid-template-= columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;">
<div class=3D"<= span class=3D"html-attribute-value">form-group">
<label class=3D"form-label">First Name</label>
<input type=3D"text" name=3D"firstName" plac= eholder=3D"Tara" required class=3D"form-input">
<div class=3D"form-g= roup">
<l= abel class=3D"form-label">Last Name</label>
<input type=3D"text" = name=3D"lastName" placeholder=3D"Smith" required class=3D"form-input">
</div>
</div>
<div = class=3D"form-group">
<label class=3D= "form-label">Email</label>
<input type=3D"= email" name=3D"email" placeholder=3D"you@company.com" required class=3D= "form-input">
</div>
<div class=3D"form-group">
<label class=3D"form-lab= el">I'm interested in</label&g= t;
<select name=3D"interest" class=3D"form-input">
= <option value=3D"">Select a service...</option>
&l= t;option value=3D"streaming">Streaming & DRM</option>
<option value= =3D"immersive">Immers= ive Tech</option>
= <option v= alue=3D"cloud">Cloud Infrastructure</option>
<option value=3D"platform">Custom Platform</option>
<option value=3D"tarapad">TaraPad / Sports Tech= </option>
<op= tion value=3D"partnership">Strategic Partnership</option>
<option value= =3D"other">Other</option>
</select>
</div>
<div <= span class=3D"html-attribute-name">class=3D"form-group">
<label class=3D= "form-label">Message<= span class=3D"html-tag"></label>
<textarea name= =3D"message" placeholder=3D"Tell us about your project..." required class=3D"form-input form-textarea"><= span class=3D"html-tag"></textarea>
</div>
<button type=3D"submit" class=3D"btn-primary"= style=3D"align-self:center;border:none;cursor:pointer;" id=3D"submitBtn">
Send Message
</button>
<p id= =3D"formSuccess" style=3D"= display:none;color:#4ade80;font-family:var(--font-condensed);letter-spacing= :.2em;font-size:.75rem;text-align:center;margin-top:.5rem;">MESSAGE SENT =E2=80=94 WE'LL BE IN TOUCH.</p&= gt;
<p id=3D"formE= rror" style=3D"display:none;color:#f87171;font-family:var(--fon= t-condensed);letter-spacing:.2em;font-size:.75rem;text-align:center;margin-= top:.5rem;">SOMETHING WENT WRONG =E2=80=94 <a href=3D"mailto:hello@taratech= ent.com" style=3D"color:#f87171;text-decoration:underline;"= >EMAIL US DIRECTLY</a>.</p>
<p style=3D"font-family:var(--font-condensed);font-size:.6rem= ;letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--text-dim);text-align:center;margin-top:1.= 5rem;text-transform:uppercase;">Or reach us directly at <a href=3D"mailto:h= ello@taratechent.com" style= =3D"color:var(--blue);text-decoration:= none;">hello@taratechent.com</= a></p>

<div style=3D"text-align:center;">
<div style=3D"<= span class=3D"html-attribute-value">font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:.5rem;">=F0=9F=87=BA=F0=9F=87=B8</div&= gt;

<= span class=3D"html-tag"><div style=3D"font-family:var(--font-sans);= font-size:.68rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--text-dim);margin-top:.2rem;let= ter-spacing:.04em;">Headquarters&= lt;/div>
</div>=
<div style=3D"t= ext-align:center;border-left:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-right:1= px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);">

= <div = style=3D"font-family:var(--font-condensed);font-size:.75rem;font-weigh= t:500;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;">= Lagos, NG</div>
= <div style=3D"font-family:var(--fon= t-sans);font-size:.68rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--text-dim);margin-top:.= 2rem;letter-spacing:.04em;">Africa Operations</div>
</div>
<div = style=3D"text-align:center;">
