document.querySelectorAll('[id$=3D"Logo"]').= forEach(el =3D> el.src =3D LOGO_SRC);

const= cursor =3D document.getElementById('cursor');
const ring = =3D document.getElementById('cursorRing');
let mx=3D0,my=3D0,r= x=3D0,ry=3D0;
function animCursor() {=
cursor.style.left=3Dmx+'px'; cursor.style.top=3Dmy+'px';
rx+=3D(mx-rx)*.12; ry+=3D(my-ry)*.12;
ring.st= yle.left=3Drx+'px'; ring.style.top=3Dry+'px';
requestAnimati= onFrame(animCursor);
= }
animCursor();
= document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.service-card,.pillar').forEach(el =3D= > {
el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=3D>{ cursor.st= yle.width=3D'18px';cursor.style.height=3D'18px';ring.style.width=3D'52px';r= ing.style.height=3D'52px'; });
el.addEventListener('mouselea= ve',()=3D>{ cursor.style.width=3D'10px';cursor.style.height=3D'10px';rin= g.style.width=3D'34px';ring.style.height=3D'34px'; });
});

for(let i=3D0;i<18;i++){
const p=3Ddocumen= t.createElement('div'); p.className=3D'particle';
const s=3D= Math.random()*2.5+1;
= p.style.cssText=3D`width:${s}px;height:= ${s}px;left:${Math.random()*100}%;animation-duration:${Math.random()*10+8}s= ;animation-delay:${Math.random()*12}s;`;
pe.appendChild(p);<= /td>
}
const obs =3D new IntersectionO= bserver(entries=3D>{
entries.forEach(e=3D>{ if(e.isInt= ersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
},{threshold= :.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(r=3D>ob= s.observe(r));
// Active nav tile on scroll
const sections =3D ['about','services','ecosystem','tarapad','co= ntact'];
const navLinks =3D document.querySelectorAll('.nav-li= nks a');
const sectionObs =3D new IntersectionObserver(entries= =3D>{
entries.forEach(e=3D>{
if(e.isI= ntersecting){
if(match) match.= classList.add('active');
}
});
= },{rootMargin:'-40% 0px -55% 0px'});
sections.forEach(id=3D&g= t;{ const el=3Ddocument.getElementById(id); if(el) sectionObs.observe(el); = });

<= /td> // Contact Form - AJAX submission via Form= spree
const contactForm =3D document.getElementById('contactF= orm');
if (contactForm) {
contactForm.addEventL= istener('submit', async function(e) {
e.preventDefault();<= /td>
const btn =3D document.getElementById('submitBtn');
const success =3D document.getElementById('formSuccess');
const error =3D document.getElementById('formError');
btn.disabled =3D true;
btn.textContent =3D 'Sendin= g...';
success.style.display =3D 'none';
= error.style.display =3D 'none';
try {
c= onst res =3D await fetch(contactForm.action, {
method:= 'POST',
body: new FormData(contactForm),
= headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
});=
if (res.ok) {
success.style.displa= y =3D 'block';
= btn.textContent =3D 'Sent!';
} else {
= throw new Error('Form error');
}
= } catch(err) {
btn.disabled =3D false;
btn.textContent =3D '= Send Message';
});
}


// - HAMBURGER MENU -
co= nst hamburger =3D document.getElementById('hamburger');
const = mobileMenu =3D document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
hamburge= r.addEventListener('click', () =3D> {
hamburger.classList= .toggle('open');
mobileMenu.classList.toggle('open');
document.body.style.overflow =3D mobileMenu.classList.contains('op= en') ? 'hidden' : '';
});
function closeMobile() = {
hamburger.classList.remove('open');
mobileM= enu.classList.remove('open');
document.body.style.overflow = =3D '';
}

// - SERVICES TABS -
document.querySelectorAll('.service-tab').forEach(tab =3D> {<= /td>
tab.addEventListener('click', () =3D> {
= document.querySelectorAll('.service-tab').forEach(t =3D> t.classList.rem= ove('active'));
document.querySelectorAll('.service-panel'= ).forEach(p =3D> p.classList.remove('active'));
tab.c= lassList.add('active');
document.getElementById('tab-' + t= ab.dataset.tab).classList.add('active');
});
})= ;

// - ANIMATED STAT COUNTERS -
f= unction animateCount(el, target, duration=3D1800) {
let sta= rt =3D 0, startTime =3D null;
const isNum =3D !isNaN(target= );
if (!isNum) { el.textContent =3D target; return; }
function step(ts) {
if (!startTime) startTime = =3D ts;
const progress =3D Math.min((ts - startTime) / dur= ation, 1);
const ease =3D 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
el.textContent =3D Math.floor(ease * target);
= if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
else= el.textContent =3D target;
}
requestAnimatio= nFrame(step);
const statObs =3D new Intersect= ionObserver(entries =3D> {
entries.forEach(e =3D> {
if (e.isIntersecting && !e.target.dataset.animated)= {
e.target.dataset.animated =3D '1';
= e.target.querySelectorAll('.stat-num').forEach(el =3D> {
= const raw =3D el.textContent.trim();
const num = =3D parseInt(raw);
if (!isNaN(num)) animateCount(el, n= um);
});
}
});
}, { threshold: 0.5 });
document.querySelectorAll('.sta= ts').forEach(s =3D> statObs.observe(s));

//= - LIVE CHAT WIDGET -
const chatBubble =3D document.getElement= ById('chatBubble');
<= /td> const chatPanel =3D document.getElementByI= d('chatPanel');
chatBubble.addEventListener('click', () =3D>= ; {
chatPanel.classList.toggle('open');
chatB= ubble.textContent =3D chatPanel.classList.contains('open') ? 'X' : '=F0=9F= =92=AC';
});
function chatSelect(type) {
const responses =3D {
services: 'Great! We offer = Streaming & DRM, Immersive Tech, Cloud Infrastructure, Custom Platforms= , Sports Tech, and Cybersecurity. Scroll up to explore each -- or contact u= s for a custom quote.',
tarapad: 'TaraPad is our AI-powere= d basketball training system using laser trajectory guidance and computer v= ision. We are opening a beta program -- scroll down to apply via the contac= t form!',
partner: 'We love strategic partnerships! The be= st next step is reaching out via our contact form below. Our team will resp= ond within 24 hours.',
contact: 'You can reach us directly= at hello@taratechent.com or fill out our contact form below. We will get b= ack to you within 24 hours.'
};
const body = =3D chatPanel.querySelector('.chat-body');
body.innerHTML = =3D `<div class=3D"chat-msg">${responses[type]}</div>
<div class=3D"chat-options">
<button cl= ass=3D"chat-opt" onclick=3D"chatReset()">&lt; Back to menu</butto= n>
<button class=3D"chat-opt" onclick=3D"document= .getElementById('contact').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});chatPanel.cl= assList.remove('open');chatBubble.textContent=3D'=F0=9F=92=AC'">=F0=9F= =93=A7 Contact Us</button>
</div>`;
}
function chatReset() {
const body =3D ch= atPanel.querySelector('.chat-body');
body.innerHTML =3D `<= ;div class=3D"chat-msg">Hey! =F0=9F=91=8B Welcome to TaraTech. How can w= e help you today?</div>
<div class=3D"chat-optio= ns">
<button class=3D"chat-opt" onclick=3D"chatSel= ect('services')">=F0=9F=9B=A0 Tell me about your services</button>=
<button class=3D"chat-opt" onclick=3D"chatSelect('ta= rapad')">=F0=9F=8F=80 I want to learn about TaraPad</button>
<button class=3D"chat-opt" onclick=3D"chatSelect('partner'= )">=F0=9F=A4=9D I'm interested in partnering</button>
= <button class=3D"chat-opt" onclick=3D"chatSelect('contact')">= =F0=9F=93=A7 Connect me with your team</button>
<= /div>`;
}

// - ADD NEWS/PRESS/= PARTNERS TO NAV SCROLL TRACKING -
const allSections =3D ['abou= t','services','ecosystem','tarapad','products','locations','news','press','= partners','contact'];
allSections.forEach(id =3D> { const e= l =3D document.getElementById(id); if(el) sectionObs.observe(el); });

</script>
